scripts.build: npm run build-content && node scripts/setup-pbs-clone.mjs && node scripts/fetch-pbs-play-pages.mjs && node scripts/fetch-pbs-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-pbs-route-manifest.mjs && next build
scripts.dev: npm run build-content && node scripts/setup-pbs-clone.mjs && node scripts/fetch-pbs-play-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-pbs-route-manifest.mjs && next dev
scripts.setup-pbs: npm run build-content && node scripts/setup-pbs-clone.mjs && node scripts/fetch-pbs-play-pages.mjs && node scripts/fetch-pbs-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-pbs-route-manifest.mjs
scripts.build-content: node scripts/build-sonke-catalog.mjs && node scripts/build-games-overrides.mjs && node scripts/build-property-map.mjs
scripts.fetch-pbs: curl.exe -sL https://pbskids.org/ -o public/pbs-home.html && curl.exe -sL https://pbskids.org/games -o public/pbs-games.html && curl.exe -sL https://pbskids.org/videos -o public/pbs-videos.html && npm run setup-pbs
